name: resident_train_perf
title: Resident Train
desc: FULL FUSED RESIDENT training step: forward render + on-device loss grad (dLdC=C-gt) + backward, all in ONE doorbell ring per tile, every intermediate in L1. 27 stages, one compile-time STAGE TABLE dispatched by op (matmul / matmul+SFPU / matmul+recip / eltwise-mul / eltwise-sub). On silicon: RGB 52.6dB + dLdpsi 1.6% + dLdop 1.1% vs golden. dLdcolor delegated to x280 (transpose_dest corrupts the eltwise pipeline). Build overrides ITERATIONS=32.

telemetry.note: elapsed cycles + event counts per zone; published to the L1 perf region at 0x169000. Decode pending — runner currently peeks the base word only.

note: bhtop resident canon; see RESIDENT_GRID.md. Unifies resident_render_perf + resident_backward_perf + a 3-stage seam. Recip inputs need finite col-padding.
